title: Test Layers, Service Containers, Coverage, and Changed-Case Evidence
description: A green unit suite mocks every boundary, integration tests share mutable state, service containers have no readiness check, and coverage increases while production behavior regresses. Learners cumulatively produce layered test and service evidence plan through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Allocate unit, component, integration, contract, end-to-end, accessibility, security, and smoke tests from failure risk and feedback cost.
Configure service image identity, ports, health, credentials, network scope, per-job state, migrations, fixtures, and deterministic teardown.
Shard tests without duplicate or missing cases and detect order, time, locale, seed, port, and shared-state dependence.
